title: Balance analysis from auto-play stats
warning: NO AUTOPLAY STATS FOUND - Analysis is theoretical based on merlin_constants.gd

life_drain_balance.issue: Too low - players can survive 100 cards without healing
life_drain_balance.predicted_impact: No survival pressure, REST nodes optional, crit fails don't matter
life_drain_balance.rationale: 30-card run = 60 HP drain, forces 2-3 REST nodes, makes crit fails dangerous

dc_ranges.note: Dynamic DC ranges create 20-30% variance per option - excellent for variety

ending_distribution.pity_system: After 5 runs with same ending, guarantees different ending

souffle_economy.issue: Unclear when Souffle is consumed - all card options cost 0
souffle_economy.hypothesis: Consumed by Bestiole Oghams, special events, or Souffle Perks
souffle_economy.recommendation: Document trigger conditions + track usage in autoplay (target 60-80% of runs)

awen_economy.issue: Allows 3 special Ogham uses per run (should be 1-2 max)
awen_economy.impact: Limits special Ogham uses to 2.3/run instead of 3/run

power_milestones.issue: Card 5 heal likely overcapped (player at 90+ HP)
power_milestones.recommendation: Swap milestones 5 and 8 - give Souffle early, heal when needed

life_vs_failures.note: If drain = 2/card, compound drain creates meaningful pressure

awen_vs_equilibre.note: Rewards balanced play with bonus Awen

dc_reduction_milestone.note: DC -2 at card 10 may trivialize mid-game difficulty

action_items.rationale: All predictions need validation with real data
Double survival pressure to meaningful level
Currently unclear when resource is used
